mapper.select:
SELECT ec.event_id AS eventId, c.category_name AS categoryName FROM event_categories ec JOIN categories c ON ec.category_id = c.category_id
ec.event_id IN
#{id}
1=0

SELECT DISTINCT e.* FROM events e JOIN event_categories ec ON e.event_id = ec.event_id JOIN categories c ON ec.category_id = c.category_id WHERE 1=1
AND LOWER(c.category_name) = LOWER(#{category})
AND e.start_time BETWEEN
CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day'
CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day' AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '2 days'
CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '7 days'
CURRENT_DATE + (7 - EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM CURRENT_DATE))::INT * INTERVAL '1 day' AND CURRENT_DATE + (9 - EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM CURRENT_DATE))::INT * INTERVAL '1 day'
CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '7 days' AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '14 days'
AND LOWER(e.location) = LOWER(#{near})
ORDER BY e.start_time ASC
